title: 3 Railroad Stocks to Watch Amid the Industry Weakness
text: The Zacks Industry Rank for the Transportation-Rail industry paints a murky picture. Braving the industry headwinds are three stocks, CNI, CP and CSX, which investors might consider keeping on their radar.

title: What Next For CSX Stock After A 19% Fall In Q3 Earnings?
text: CSX (NYSE: CSX) reported its Q3 results last week, with revenues falling below and earnings meeting the street estimates.

title: CSX and BRS Reach Second Agreement on Paid Sick Leave
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Oct. 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) is announcing the ratification of a paid sick leave agreement covering approximately 200 employees represented by the Brotherhood of Railroad Signalmen (BRS) on the company's L&N property.

title: CSX Q3 Earnings In Line With Estimates, Revenues Surpass
text: CSX's third-quarter 2023 revenues are hurt by lower fuel prices, reduced intermodal storage revenues, a decline in export coal benchmark prices, and a decrease in intermodal volumes.

title: CSX on track to reap benefits of strong service momentum, analysts say
text: CSX Corp.'s third-quarter service performance is resonating with analysts, despite subdued shipping trends.

title: CSX Stock: A Total Return Star With 15% Annual Return Potential
text: CSX Corporation displays resilience, with a robust focus on commodities and merchandise, efficient operations, and consistent rewards for investors through dividends and buybacks.

title: Markets Struggle with Bond Yields, Fed Chair and Earnings
text: Powell said inflation is still too high, and that monetary policy -- at 5.25-5.50%, the highest in 16 years -- was still not too tight.

title: CSX (CSX) Matches Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: CSX (CSX) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.42 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $0.52 per share a year ago.

title: CSX (CSX) Q3 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for CSX (CSX) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: CSX's results are a mixed bag, amid weaker rail demand and ‘low expectations'
text: CSX Corp. on Thursday reported a quarterly per-share profit that just missed estimates but sales that just topped them, as shipping demand remained sluggish.

title: CSX Corp. Announces Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Oct. 19, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced third quarter 2023 operating income of $1.30 billion compared to $1.58 billion in the prior year period. Net earnings of $846 million, or $0.42 per diluted share, compared to $1.11 billion, or $0.52 per diluted share, in the same period last year.

title: CSX clinches agreement on paid sick leave with Brotherhood of Railroad Signalmen
text: CSX Corp. has reached an agreement for paid sick leave with the Brotherhood of Railroad Signalmen, the railroad company announced Thursday.

title: CSX and BRS Reach Agreement on Paid Sick Leave
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Oct. 19, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corporation (NASDAQ: CSX) is pleased to announce the ratification of a paid sick leave agreement with the SCL property for the Brotherhood of Railroad Signalmen covering nearly 400 employees.

title: CSX, Intuitive Surgical to Release Earnings Reports Thursday Afternoon
text: Tech sector earnings season gets started after U.S. markets close on Wednesday, when Netflix and Tesla will release earnings reports.

title: Analysts Estimate CSX (CSX) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: CSX (CSX) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: CSX Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Oct. 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) announced that the Company's Board of Directors approved a $0.11 per share quarterly dividend on the Company's common stock. The dividend is payable on December 15, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on November 30, 2023.

title: Analyst Upgrades CSX Stock, Adds to 'Focus List'
text: J.P. Morgan Securities upgraded CSX Corporation  (NASDAQ:CSX) stock to "overweight" from "neutral" this morning, raised its price target to $40 from $37, and added it to its "focus list" as a prime value option.

title: Analyst Upgrades CSX Stock, Adds to 'Focus List'
text: J.P. Morgan Securities upgraded CSX Corporation  (NASDAQ:CSX) stock to "overweight" from "neutral" this morning, raised its price target to $40 from $37, and added it to its "focus list" as a prime value option.

title: J.P. Morgan upgrades CSX and cuts rating on RXO
text: CSX Corp.'s stock was up 1.6% in premarket trading on Wednesday after J.P. Morgan upgraded the rail company to overweight from neutral.
